name: ai-team-os
description: AI Agent Team Operating System for Claude Code with 150+ MCP tools (incl. 40+ ecosystem research tools), 40+ agent templates, 12+ lifecycle hooks. Persistent team management, structured meetings, task wall with pipeline workflows, company loop engine, real-time React dashboard, and Ecosystem Research Platform v2 (progressive 4-stage deep-review funnel: shallow auto-summary → on-demand architecture → debate-based finalist evaluation → reference/integrate marking, with project-customizable thresholds, append-only history snapshots, and Failed self-learning).
